mnemonics.title: Elicitation Techniques
mnemonics.content: **I**nterviews **S**ee **O**ur **P**roject **B**egin? (Interviews, Surveys, Observation, Prototyping, Brainstorming) - A quick list of key techniques.

mnemonics.title: Challenges of Elicitation
mnemonics.content: **S**takeholders **A**re **C**onstantly **C**hanging? (Stakeholder Ambiguity, Implicit Knowledge, Conflicting Viewpoints, Changing Requirements) - Summarizes the core difficulties.
